course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #7 -  Enchanting Table — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #7 -  Enchanting Table" — 4 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 16

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #7 -  Enchanting Table — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
To enchant my tools, I needed to craft an **enchanting** table. This requires two diamonds, four obsidian blocks, and a book — all **expensive** materials to gather.

Mining obsidian was the hardest part. You need a diamond pickaxe and each block takes about ten seconds to break. The obsidian forms where water meets **lava** and turns it into a hard black **substance**.

I placed the enchanting table in a special room and surrounded it with fifteen bookshelves. The bookshelves must have one block of air between them and the table for the **magic** to flow **properly**.

My first enchantment was Efficiency IV on my pickaxe! The enchanting table shows three **options** at different levels. Spending lapis lazuli and experience levels **activates** the enchantment.
lesson.transcript_zh:
为了给工具附魔，我需要制作一个附魔台。这需要两颗钻石、四块黑曜石和一本书——都是昂贵的材料。

挖黑曜石是最难的部分。你需要钻石镐，每块大约需要十秒钟才能打破。黑曜石在水遇到岩浆并将其变成坚硬黑色物质时形成。

我把附魔台放在一个特殊房间并用十五个书架环绕。书架和台子之间必须有一格空气让魔法正常流通。

我的第一个附魔是给镐附的效率IV！附魔台显示三个不同等级的选项。花费青金石和经验等级激活附魔。
